failure_modes.cause: BPR set below required pressure, leading to potential overpressure
failure_modes.mitigation: Adjust BPR to 13.6 bar to match system requirements

failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure
Ensure temperature control within ±2°C of setpoint

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=2.79798 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Test BPR adjustment to 13.6 bar and verify system stability under operating conditions
Conduct thermal stability test of solvent at 120°C for 24 hours to assess degradation
